method_summary: The Empower method fine-tunes language models by maximizing human empowerment using only offline text data, without requiring explicit human feedback or verifiable rewards.
key_innovation: A self-supervised approach to tuning assistive language models based on maximizing human empowerment using only offline data.
best_result: 192% increase in success rate of simulated human programmer on challenging coding questions
title: Training LLM Agents to Empower Humans
